info.title: Beans API & MCP
info.description: Beans API & MCP is the Cafecito intelligent news & blogs aggregation and search service. It curates fresh content from RSS feeds using AI-powered natural language queries and filters. Access trending articles, publishers, categories, and entities with fast JSON responses, perfect for developers building news apps or integrating smart content discovery.

tags.name: Articles
tags.description: Trending, latest, and searchable news and blog articles

tags.name: Tags
tags.description: Unique categories, entities, and regions for filtering articles

Bean.title: Bean
Bean.description: Bean is the main content model returned by article endpoints.

url.description: URL is the canonical URL of the article or post.

content_type.description: Kind is the content type, for example news, blog, post, generated, or comment.

title.description: Title is the human-readable headline or title of the content.

summary.description: Summary is a short abstract or teaser used in listings and previews.

content.description: Content is the full body text when the source content is available.

author.description: Author is the byline or attributed creator when available from the source.

source.description: Source is the canonical publisher identifier and matches Publisher.Source.

image_url.description: ImageUrl is the featured image or preview image associated with the content.

published_at.description: Created is the original publish timestamp of the article or post.

categories.description: Categories lists the inferred topics assigned to the content.

regions.description: Regions lists geographic regions mentioned in or associated with the content.

entities.description: Entities lists named entities such as people, places, organizations, or products.

tags.description: Computed tags merged from categories/regions/entities for display

sentiments.description: Sentiments lists inferred tones or sentiments expressed in the content.

BeanTrend.description: BeanTrend composes a `Bean` with aggregated social metrics (Likes, Comments, Subscribers, Shares, Related, TrendScore).

url.description: URL is the canonical URL of the article or post.

title.description: Title is the human-readable headline or title of the content.

summary.description: Summary is a short abstract or teaser used in listings and previews.

content.description: Content is the full body text when the source content is available.

content_type.description: Kind is the content type, for example news, blog, post, generated, or comment.

author.description: Author is the byline or attributed creator when available from the source.

image_url.description: ImageUrl is the featured image or preview image associated with the content.

source.description: Source is the canonical publisher identifier and matches Publisher.Source.

categories.description: Categories lists the inferred topics assigned to the content.

regions.description: Regions lists geographic regions mentioned in or associated with the content.

entities.description: Entities lists named entities such as people, places, organizations, or products.

tags.description: Computed tags merged from categories/regions/entities for display

published_at.description: Created is the original publish timestamp of the article or post.

likes.description: Likes is the aggregate number of likes or upvotes associated with this Bean.

comments.description: Comments is the aggregate number of replies or comments associated with this Bean.

shares.description: Shares is the aggregate number of reposts or share-like actions associated with this Bean.

subscribers.description: Subscribers is the aggregate audience size associated with this Bean's chatter. Not populated on current list endpoints.

related.description: Related is the count of semantically or editorially related Beans.

trend_score.description: TrendScore is the computed ranking score used to order trending results. Returned by top-headlines and trending; not returned by search.

sentiments.description: Sentiments lists inferred tones or sentiments expressed in the content.

BeanAggregate.description: BeanAggregate composes a `BeanTrend` with the publisher's display fields

source.title: Source
source.description: Source is the canonical publisher identifier and matches Bean.Source values.

source_base_url.title: Source Base Url
source_base_url.description: BaseURL is the publisher's primary site URL.

source_description.title: Source Description
source_description.description: Description is a short description of the publisher or content source.

source_favicon.title: Source Favicon
source_favicon.description: Favicon is the URL of the publisher favicon or brand icon.

source_site_name.title: Source Site Name
source_site_name.description: SiteName is the human-readable display name of the publisher.

Publisher.title: Publisher
Publisher.description: Publisher contains identifying and descriptive information about a publisher

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of unique article categories/topics discovered in the database.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: pagination offset (number of items to skip)

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of unique named entities (persons, organizations, products, places) extracted from articles.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: pagination offset (number of items to skip)

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of unique geographic regions mentioned in articles.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: pagination offset (number of items to skip)

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieves top trending headlines from the past 24 hours, ranked by trend score.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: case/whitespace-insensitive text search across categories, regions, entities (recommended)

200.description: array of top headlines from last 24h, sorted by trend_score

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieves the most recently published articles, sorted by publish date (newest first).

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: case/whitespace-insensitive text search across categories, regions, entities (recommended)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: published since date (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to 7 days ago if omitted)

200.description: array of latest articles sorted by publish date

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieves trending articles ranked by trend score. Trend score is computed from social engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares, subscriber reactions), publication coverage (number of sources publishing the same content), and recency of engagement.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: case/whitespace-insensitive text search across categories, regions, entities (recommended)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: trending since date (YYYY-MM-DD, defaults to 7 days ago)

200.description: array of trending articles sorted by trend_score (descending)

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: Perform semantic (vector embedding) or tag-based search across all articles in the database. At least one of `q`, `tags`, `categories`, `regions`, `entities`, or `urls` is required.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: semantic vector search query (max 512 characters, natural language)

parameters.name: acc
parameters.description: embedding accuracy/similarity threshold (0.0-1.0, higher = stricter match)

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: specific article URLs to fetch directly (CSV)

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: case/whitespace-insensitive text search across categories, regions, entities (AND combination, recommended)

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: precise category topic filters (inclusive OR, case/whitespace-sensitive)

parameters.name: regions
parameters.description: precise geographic region filters (inclusive OR, case/whitespace-sensitive)

parameters.name: entities
parameters.description: precise named entity filters (inclusive OR, case/whitespace-sensitive)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: published/updated since date (ISO 8601 date format YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: full_content
parameters.description: if true, include full article content (large payload)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: pagination offset (number of items to skip)

200.description: array of article aggregates with engagement metrics (likes, comments, shares, related) and publisher fields; does not include trend_score

400.description: bad request: missing required search parameters or invalid input

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: For each article URL, returns publisher coverage (from related_beans) and social mentions (from chatters).

400.description: missing urls, too many urls (>128), invalid URL, or binding error

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

post.description: For each article URL, returns publisher coverage (from related_beans) and social mentions (from chatters).

400.description: missing urls, too many urls (>128), invalid URL, or binding error

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key

get.description: Retrieves detailed metadata for one or more sources including site name, description, favicon.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: source IDs to fetch metadata for (comma-separated CSV)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: pagination offset (number of items to skip)

400.description: invalid pagination parameters or missing/invalid sources

401.description: unauthorized: missing or invalid API key
